fs.writeFileSync(tmpPath, JSON.stringify(awInfo, null, 2));
console.log('Generated aw_info.json at:', tmpPath);

core.setOutput('model', awInfo.model);

2026-02-26T19:22:09.7155960Z The PR has been created successfully. Here's a summary of all the documentation inconsistencies found and fixed:
2026-02-26T19:22:09.7156769Z 
2026-02-26T19:22:10.0115735Z ## Issues Found and Fixed
2026-02-26T19:22:10.0116152Z 
2026-02-26T19:22:10.0119055Z ### 1. `Generate-code-from-TypeSpec.md` — Incorrect pnpm install command
2026-02-26T19:22:10.5515154Z - **Problem:** `npm install -g @pnpm` — the npm package `@pnpm` does not exist
2026-02-26T19:22:10.5516521Z - **Fix:** Changed to `npm install -g pnpm`
2026-02-26T19:22:10.5516936Z 
2026-02-26T19:22:10.7796146Z ### 2. `Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md` — Outdated mocha/chai test patterns
2026-02-26T19:22:10.7796855Z 
2026-02-26T19:22:11.4795788Z The code examples in both `glossary.spec.ts` and `monitor.spec.ts` examples used the old **mocha** + **chai** testing patterns, but the repository now uses **vitest**:
2026-02-26T19:22:11.4796541Z 
2026-02-26T19:22:11.7636604Z | Outdated pattern | Correct pattern |
2026-02-26T19:22:11.7637439Z |---|---|
2026-02-26T19:22:12.1985262Z | `import { assert } from "chai"` | `import { assert, describe, it, beforeEach, afterEach } from "vitest"` |
2026-02-26T19:22:12.1988178Z | `import { Context } from "mocha"` | `import type { TestInfo } from "@azure-tools/test-recorder"` |
2026-02-26T19:22:12.4557326Z | `createRecorder(context: Context)` | `createRecorder(context: TestInfo)` |
2026-02-26T19:22:12.6834123Z | `new Recorder(context.currentTest)` | `new Recorder(context)` |
2026-02-26T19:22:12.9159030Z | `beforeEach(async function (this: Context) {...})` | `beforeEach(async (ctx) => {...})` |
2026-02-26T19:22:13.1513635Z | `recorder = new Recorder(this.currentTest)` | `recorder = new Recorder(ctx)` |
2026-02-26T19:22:13.1514398Z 
2026-02-26T19:22:13.6885384Z These were verified against actual test files in the repository (e.g., `sdk/purview/purview-datamap-rest/test/public/` and `sdk/monitor/arm-monitor/test/`).
2026-02-26T19:22:13.6886512Z 
2026-02-26T19:22:13.6941393Z

2026-02-26T19:22:13.6945005Z Total code changes:     +11 -12

Perfect for discovering projects, finding examples, or locating specific repositories across GitHub.","icons":[{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"light"},{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"dark"}],"inputSchema":{"properties":{"minimal_output":{"default":true,"description":"Return minimal repository information (default: true). 2026-02-26T19:22:28.2039103Z {"timestamp":"2026-02-26T19:21:24.537519194Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Summary of Changes\n\nThis PR fixes two documentation inconsistencies found in the `documentation/` folder.\n\n### 1. `Generate-code-from-TypeSpec.md` – Incorrect pnpm install command\n\n**Problem:** The command `npm install -g @pnpm` is incorrect. There is no npm package named `@pnpm`; the correct package name is `pnpm`.\n\n**Fix:** Changed `npm install -g @pnpm` to `npm install -g pnpm`.\n\n### 2. `Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md` – Outdated mocha/chai test examples\n\n**Problem:** The two code examples in this doc (`glossary.spec.ts` and `monitor.spec.ts`) were using patterns from the old **mocha** test framework and **chai** assertion library, which this repository no longer uses. The actual test framework is **vitest**.\n\nSpecifically:\n- `import { assert } from \"chai\"` → should use vitest's `assert`\n- `import { Context } from \"mocha\"` → mocha's `Context` type was used to pass test context to the `Recorder` constructor; vitest uses a plain context object (`TestInfo` from `@azure-tools/test-recorder`)\n- `beforeEach(async function (this: Context) { ... })` → vitest uses arrow function callbacks with an explicit `ctx` parameter\n- `new Recorder(this.currentTest)` / `new Recorder(context.currentTest)` → should be `new Recorder(ctx)` / `new Recorder(context)` since `TestInfo` is passed directly\n\n**Fix:**\n- Replaced `import { assert } from \"chai\"` with `import { assert, describe, it, beforeEach, afterEach } from \"vitest\"` in both example files\n- Replaced `import { Context } from \"mocha\"` with `import type { TestInfo } from \"@azure-tools/test-recorder\"` in `recordedClient.ts` example\n- Updated `createRecorder(context: Context)` to `createRecorder(context: TestInfo)` and `new Recorder(context.currentTest)` to `new Recorder(context)`\n- Updated `beforeEach` callbacks to use vitest-style arrow functions with `ctx` parameter\n- Updated `new Recorder(this.currentTest)` to `new Recorder(ctx)`\n\nThese changes align the documentation examples with the actual patterns used in the repository (e.g., `sdk/purview/purview-datamap-rest/test/public/`, `sdk/monitor/arm-monitor/test/`).\n","branch":"docs/fix-documentation-inconsistencies","title":"Fix documentation inconsistencies: incorrect pnpm command and outdated mocha/chai test examples"},"name":"create_pull_request"}}}

2026-02-26T19:22:28.2463342Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-02-26T19:22:28.2463619Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-02-26T19:22:28.2463777Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
